title: CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Executive Assistant to Director Posts
description: The Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Executive Assistant to Director Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, MCA, and MBA can apply for the CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, se...
